cover.era_chip: 高句麗 · 百濟 · 新羅
cover.subtitle:
근초고왕·광개토대왕·진흥왕,
전성기를 지배한 자들.
cover.imagePrompt: Three Kingdoms era illustration, 5th century. ONE Goguryeo king figure (King Gwanggaeto) in deep crimson and gold royal robe with pointed crown, standing atop a fortress wall overlooking the Liaodong plain. Behind him a tall stele silhouette suggesting Gwanggaeto Stele. Composition: conquering authority, sweeping landscape. Color: gold + clay-brown + bronze + sky blue. Style: flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image. No realistic photo quality, no anime, no modern anachronism.

outro.tip_headline:
"체제 정비 = 소수림·법흥, 전성기 = 광개토·근초고·진흥"
역할로 묶어 외운다.
outro.tip_body: 심화 시험에서는 왕의 업적을 시대순으로 배열하거나, 비슷한 업적의 왕(예: 광개토 vs 장수)을 헷갈리게 묻는다. '체제 정비 트리오(소수림·법흥)'와 '전성기 트리오(광개토·근초고·진흥)'를 묶어서 정리할 것.
outro.imagePrompt: Minimal hanji-beige background. CENTER: a stylized seven-pronged sword (chiljido) icon shown from a slight angle. RIGHT: a small Gwanggaeto stele silhouette. Cream #F2EDE3 base + gold #C9A24A accent. Flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image. No realistic photo quality, no anime, no modern anachronism.
